subject: Re: JE Shed
body:
home depot


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 28, 2008 9:04:34 AM
Subject: FW: JE Shed


 
 
From: lance calloway [mailto:lancecalloway@gmail.com] 
Sent: Thursday, February 28, 2008 7:13 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: JE Shed
 
Lesley,
 
Can you do me a huge favor?  I need JE approval on one thing.  JE asked for a building to be built with large glass doors.  Could you please pass this along to him so he can decide which doors he would like us to purchase. Please remind him that the shutters are only 8 feet tall.
 
Options:
 
1) Purchase 4 doors measuring  8 feet wide x 6 feet 8 inches tall.  $280 each - total $1120 for all 4 doors.  These are from Home Depot and available now.  We can make up a glass panel  on top of door to get 8 feet of glass.  
 
2) Purchase several doors at different sizes that all need to be ordered and will take at least 6 weeks.  
    
    6' W x 8' H   $715.70 each  = $2862.80  (4 doors: 2 in front, 1 on each side)
    
    8' W x 10' H  $2962.25 each  = $8886.75 (3 door: 1 on each side)
 
These are the lower cost doors, again will need to be ordered and will take at least 6 weeks to recieve.
 
Thanks 
 
Lance
